name: uzon-calc
description: 宇正群邮是一款开源的邮件群发软件，提供邮件群发、邮件营销(EDM)、邮箱采集、任意变量、AI 生成、多线程并发等功能。支持所有类型邮箱账号。原生企业级品质，支持多端用户，支持Windows、Linux、MacOS等操作系统, 支持服务器部署。已在外贸营销、教育培训、财务会计等多个行业广泛使用。 UZonMail is an open-source, enterprise‑grade bulk email and mass‑mailing platform designed for high‑volume EDM and email marketing campaigns.  Widely adopted in industries such as  education and finance. Github: https://github.com/uyoufu/UZonMail, Official：https://mail.uzoncloud.com
author: 李有福|uyoufu
